import io
import string
import list

fn insert_into_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ val: Int) -> List<Int>
  let n = sorted.len()
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let cur = match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and val <= cur
      result = list.push(result, val)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, cur)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, val)
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = parts.len()

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let s = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      ""
    end
    let num = match string.parse_int(s)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, num)
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < n
    let val = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    sorted = insert_into_sorted(sorted, val)
    j = j + 1
  end

  let m = sorted.len()
  mut output = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < m
    let v = match sorted.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      output = "#{v}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{v}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(output)
end
